ogTitle: Yarck vs Yarra Glen: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Yarck and Yarra Glen.
heading: Yarck vs Yarra Glen — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Yarck, Victoria and Yarra Glen, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Yarra Glen has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Yarck (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Yarck or Yarra Glen safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Yarck has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Yarra Glen scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Yarck scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Yarra Glen scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Yarck or Yarra Glen?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Yarra Glen has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
